news.summary: Police are investigating a double shooting that killed a 14-year-old boy and injured a 12-year-old girl.

news.title: Woman sues Nordstrom, alleging employees wrongly detained and accused her of shoplifting

news.title: 4 people escape injury after multiple rounds fired at Atlanta home
news.summary: Four people managed to escape injury early Thursday morning when gunfire damaged a southwest Atlanta home, leaving behind more than a dozen shell casings.

news.title: Man told police he was shot after refusing marijuana from pickup driver
